title: Legendary Tooltips x Traveler's Backpack Fix
description: Patch for Legendary Tooltips to prevent massive FPS drops when an item with a stored entity is placed in a backpack inventory
body:
### Legendary Tooltips x Traveler's Backpack Fix

Patch for Legendary Tooltips to prevent massive FPS drops when an item with a stored entity is placed in a backpack inventory.

Provides fix for Prominence II modpack for Fabric

**Required only on the client**
